narrative:
Reyns 4-F (precinct in Franklin County) has 480 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 11.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.8%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 13.1 percentage points.
